title: AppDynamics Analytics Event
description: Schema representing a custom analytics event and its schema definition for the AppDynamics Events Service.

EventSchemaField.description: A field definition within a custom event schema.

type.description: The data type of the field.

label.description: A human-readable label for the field.

EventSchema.description: A custom event schema definition for the Events Service.

schema.description: The schema definition mapping field names to their type definitions.

QueryResult.description: The result of an ADQL query execution.

fields.description: The column definitions for the query results.

type.description: The data type of the column.

results.description: The data rows returned by the query.

moreData.description: Whether additional data is available beyond the limit.

totalCount.description: The total number of results matching the query.

schemaName.description: The name of the custom event schema.

schema.description: The schema definition for this event type.

events.description: Array of event data objects conforming to the schema.
